A Letter of Pelagius Unknown to Augustin.
title: A Letter of Pelagius Unknown to Augustin.

verses.book: A Treatise on the Grace of Christ, and on Original Sin.
verses.text: Chapter 39 [XXXVI]—A Letter of Pelagius Unknown to Augustin.

verses.book: A Treatise on the Grace of Christ, and on Original Sin.
verses.text: “Let them also read,” says he, “my epistle to the holy Bishop Constantius, wherein I have—briefly no doubt, but yet plainly—conjoined the grace and help of God with man’s free will.”

verses.book: A Treatise on the Grace of Christ, and on Original Sin.
verses.text: This epistle, as I have already stated, I have not read; but if it is not unlike the other writings which he mentions, and with which I am acquainted, even this work does nothing for the subject of our present inquiry.
